meta.title: Test Ballot
meta.subtitle: Comparison between current performance and the 2023 baseline

modes.label: What respondents with a view said

response_universe.explainer: In "What respondents with a view said", we remove Undecided responses and rescale the remaining responses to sum to 100%.

turnout_assumption.note: The turnout control uses weights.rds turnout denominators. It updates vote-equivalent context and active-setting labels, but does not rescore the modeled percentages in this build.

key_takeaways: Current 2027 support is compared against a parish-calibrated 2023 baseline built from the official Louisiana governor vote.
The official statewide 2023 topline panel shows raw vote share for the three displayed categories only; other and independent 2023 candidates are excluded from that comparison panel.
Use the response-universe and turnout controls to interpret whether you are looking at full-sample modeled support, decided-voter composition, or vote-equivalent context.
content.methodology_note: Current estimates are poststratified machine-learning predictions from the 2026 iGaming survey. The 2023 baseline uses official parish-level Louisiana governor results, collapsed into the three displayed test-ballot categories. We calibrate each parish to those official 2023 category shares before aggregating back to statewide, parish, cultural-region, demographic, and archetype views, so subgroup deltas are not a simple statewide shift. The official statewide 2023 topline values are displayed directly from the real statewide result. Delta means current estimate minus 2023 baseline, in percentage points. Other and independent 2023 candidates are excluded from the three displayed test-ballot categories.

feedback_callout.heading: Share Your Feedback
feedback_callout.body: Have questions about this diagnostics report or ideas for improvements? We would love to hear from you.
